name: Kindergarten Geography — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for neighborhood places, weather, cultures, and caring for places. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with neighborhood places, weather, cultures, and caring for places.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: neighborhood places, weather, cultures, and caring for places
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about neighborhood places, weather, cultures, and caring for places through a close look at neighborhood places, weather, cultures, and caring for places.

lessons.title: Try it together: neighborhood places, weather, cultures, and caring for places
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about neighborhood places, weather, cultures, and caring for places through a guided practice with neighborhood places, weather, cultures, and caring for places.
